title: crepidiastrum serawschanicum
intro: Crepidiastrum serawschanicum, also known as the Tibetan compositae or crepidiastrum, is a plant species in the daisy family. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepidiastrum serawschanicum are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often consumed as a tea or used in decoctions, with the leaves and roots being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
